name: H&l Speakeasy Chili
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Can, dark red kidney beans
16 oz Can, light red kidney beans
3 large Green peppers, cored and chopped
1 large White or yellow onion, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Break up and cook the meat in a large frying pan until browned and crumbly. Drain thoroughly.
2. Season with salt, pepper, and at least 1 tablespoon of chili powder. Set aside.
3. In a separate skillet, sauté green peppers, jalapenos, onions, and garlic in oil until they become limp.
4. Quarter the whole tomatoes and add them with the juice from the pan to a large pot.
5. Add the hamburger, sautéed vegetables, and beans to the pot.
6. Stir in the tomato juice until the chili is soupy, not too thick.
7. Season with chili powder to taste.
8. Simmer for 90 minutes, stirring frequently to prevent scorching.
9. Allow the chili to cool before serving or freezing leftovers.
